message:
fix(tui): reorder navigation tabs to place Labels and Flow before Attention and Tree

Swap ViewMode navigation_order to position LabelDashboard and
FlowMatrix before Attention and Tree in the tab strip, improving
discovery of the label/flow views on medium-width terminals where
they now appear earlier in the header.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1132,10 +1132,10 @@ impl ViewMode {
             Self::Graph,
             Self::History,
             Self::Actionable,
-            Self::Attention,
-            Self::Tree,
             Self::LabelDashboard,
             Self::FlowMatrix,
+            Self::Attention,
+            Self::Tree,
             Self::TimeTravelDiff,
             Self::Sprint,
         ]
